rules.reason: Dropping tables/objects is destructive and irreversible — never permitted from the ops copilot.
TRUNCATE wipes a table with no WHERE guard — never permitted from the ops copilot.
Schema changes (ALTER) are out of scope for the ops copilot.
DELETE removes customer-facing rows — confirm the statement first.
UPDATE mutates customer-facing rows — confirm the statement first.
Any other write to the operations DB is a real customer-facing change — confirm first.
Recording an insight edits shared state — confirm first.
